description: Mention on a PR inline review comment. `conversation.kind === "review_thread"` — our `onComment` returns null per the locked v2.5 surface decision (issues only).

pull_request.title: feat: redesign triage state backend
pull_request.body:
Migrate the agent's state backend to Turso via Drizzle.

Fixes #38.

comment.body: @eve-triage can you take a look at this?

expected.rationale: PR review threads are out of scope per the v2.5 design — even owner-role mentions on review threads are ignored. `ctx.conversation.kind === "review_thread"` short-circuits before the allowlist check.
